def build_csv_header(columns: list[str]) -> str:
    header = ""
    for col in columns:
        header += col + ","
    return header.rstrip(",")


def build_report(lines: list[str]) -> str:
    report = ""
    for line in lines:
        report += line + "\n"
    return report


def concatenate_parts(parts: list[str]) -> str:
    result = ""
    for part in parts:
        result += part
    return result
